name: pos-bus-ticketing-admin-system
description: Full-stack web admin command center for the POS Bus Ticketing Simulation.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @pos-bus/shared run build && npm --workspace @pos-bus/api run build && npm --workspace @pos-bus/admin-web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @pos-bus/shared run build && npm --workspace @pos-bus/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @pos-bus/admin-web run typecheck
